chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-227 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on MA-2836/2016 3. For katcha peshi. 19.10.2016. None appeared for the parties. Since filing of this petition, the order sheet shows that petitioner side has not appeared. In the petition it has been pleaded that private respondents No.4, 5, 6, 7 & 8 are causing continuous harassment to the petitioner and his family members and even resorted to physical violence. The main grievance of the petitioner is that official respondents/police officials are not providing protection to the petitioner being a citizen of this Country. Consequently, this petition is disposed of with direction that police officials should conduct themselves within the parameters of law and discharge their duty in an impartial manner and if they are approached by the petitioner, he should be given protection but strictly in accordance with law. Private respondents No.4 to 8 are further directed not to cause any harassment to the petitioner. JUDGE Shahid
